subcodes.first_line: The mention of the Divine Leaf upon the holy shore, amidst the branches of the Celestial Lote-Tree. O ye dwellers of the Throne, hearken ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر ورقه الهویة فی شاطی القدس علی اغصان سدرة الفردوس ان یا اهل العرش فاسمعون
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @idolatry
